name: onnozelaer-claude-marketplace
description: Personally created Claude Code plugins by Onnozelaer.

plugins.name: cabinet-of-imd
plugins.description: The Cabinet of IMD Agents — a crew of 8 college classmates serving as specialised web development agents. Vault-first operation: chatter, memories, decisions, and session anchors persist in an Obsidian vault. Gated handoffs, organic personality, lazy character loading, Cowork + terminal support. (Vault structure & /dream now owned by obsidian-bridge plugin — cabinet refactor pending.)

plugins.name: iteration-shelf
plugins.description: Terminal-aesthetic review boards for in-browser design iteration. Generates a curated shelf and a monster index from a JSON manifest — self-contained HTML, zero build step, on-demand iframe loading, sidebar outliner, and a warn-gate that keeps the browser from stalling on 100+ iterations. Explicit invocation only. Integrates with Superpowers and the Cabinet plugin.

plugins.name: bash-tui-toolkit
plugins.description: Build polished, interactive bash CLI tools with rich terminal UI — menus, tables, loading bars, spinners, splash screens, transitions, and animated effects. Makes shell scripts look crafted, not cobbled.

plugins.name: gemin-eye
plugins.description: Invoke Gemini as a sandboxed review partner from inside Claude Code. Action-shaped subcommands (review, megareview, wip, sanity, name, compare, save). Every prompt follows a rigid ROLE / DO / DON'T / SCOPE / OUTPUT / CONTEXT template. Gemini reviews only — proposed edits return as elaborate code blocks; Claude applies them. Default model `gemini-3.5-flash`; `megareview` uses `gemini-3.5-pro`. Vault-aware (pairs with obsidian-bridge).

plugins.name: obsidian-bridge
plugins.description: Standalone Obsidian-vault primitive layer: canonical schema, type-shaped project layouts, /vault-bridge command, /dream cleanup, CLI-first writes with filesystem fallback. Pairs cleanly with the cabinet-of-imd plugin but functions on its own.
